name: zero-trust
description: Zero-Trust Verification — the whole quality suite in one plugin (ADR 0025): /spec interrogation into a Spec + complete Verification Manifest, /autopilot TDD implementation drain, /audit + /verify codebase health with a debt ratchet, /marshal-pass composed-state merge backstop, a read-only org-memory MCP index, and /triage production-incident-to-Spec — all joined by one machine-readable manifest. Deterministic tools find evidence; agents judge; nothing counts until verified. See the repository README for the full tour.
